_comment: Stira hooks template. Merge into .claude/settings.json (project) or ~/.claude/settings.json (user). Replace the script paths if you installed the adapter somewhere other than $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/skills/stira/.

hooks.description: Stira: refresh state via lazy-decay; stdout is injected into Claude's context.
Stira: persist a final decay catch-up and run a silent drift check.
Stira: on-edit drift check for memory/persona files (no-op for unwatched paths).
